name: feature.notebooks.agents
description: Research Notebooks feature agent pack (ADR 0084 Phase 4 + Phase 5) — a feature-bound manifest agent over the ctx.features.notebooks surface, the notebooks-surface analog of feature.kb.agents (distinct tooling). The Notebook Research Analyst is grounded in ONE notebook's bound sources, honors per-source context levels (Full/Excluded), cites sources, and can author + persist a transformation as a notebook-owned Document. The chat-driven actions ARE the Phase-5 'AI-chat envelope' path realized via agent+nodes (NO bespoke envelope kind / acceptor seam — the priority-matrix precedent). Its tools are the feature.notebooks.nodes (ask / search / write-transformation) — NOT the kb nodes. (RFC 0003 agents[] + RFC 0002 §A14 allowlist.)
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Notebook Research Analyst
agents.description: A research analyst grounded in ONE notebook's sources. Retrieves with feature.notebooks.nodes.ask / feature.notebooks.nodes.search (over ctx.features.notebooks), honors per-source context levels (Full/Excluded), composes a cited answer, and on request authors + persists a transformation (summary / key concepts / etc.) as a notebook-owned Document via feature.notebooks.nodes.write-transformation. Tools are allowlisted to the notebooks feature surface only.
